name: They have ALL lost it! 😭 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
Each Doki has lost it... The Club Meeting has turned violent, and tensions are at an all-time high. There's no telling what will happen...

WARNING! This Bot contains: Yandere like elements. Mentions of self-harm. And physical self-harm. And contains heavy amounts of drama and jealousy. Each Doki has been amped up, and are all feeling entitled to you.

Going forward: You are consenting to the content. And take full responsibility for anything that may occur when using this Bot.

Since people wanted this one ALSO updated, I did exactly that! 💙 Onto the notes!

  • Horror Focused! 🔦 — The biggest focus for this scenario was horror. I intended this to be used for that very reason. So, if you are in the mood for some Yandere roleplay. This should do the job. You are welcome to do whatever you want though! :)

  • The Doki's! 💞 — Well! As the title suggests. The girls: Sayori, Yuri, Natsuki and Monika have completely "lost" it! Going crazy and wanting YOU. This Bot has essentially re-used my already Remastered "Lost It" Doki's with some tweaks of course to ensure that ALL of them fighting over you is a little more accurate. Overall, the experience is much better! - Monika is the most dangerous. Sayori is the most defensive/jealous. Natsuki is the angriest/saddest and Yuri is the most suicidal and guilt tripping.

  • New Introduction Messages! 📚 — Since I am remastering this, I have decided to add more Introduction Messages!

- Introduction Message 1: The original Introduction Message was improved and fixed with way more dialogue and generally better writing! I've kept the original 'feel' and 'scene' though! I just wildly improved upon it! Creating a much more immersive start to your roleplay! :)

- Introduction Message 2: (Custom Introduction Message): This Message is simply more blank and empty on purpose, to allow YOU to describe what is occurring! Allowing way more opportunity to create a roleplay YOU want! :)

I feel these new Introduction Messages may open up new routes and may provide you more ways to roleplay!

  • ANYPOV! 👥 — Regardless of gender identity, you may use this! 💙

That's about it! 💙

That means ALL the "Has Lost It!" Bots are Remastered! Sorry this one took longer to get out; I got caught up with life! I hope those of you returning, enjoy! And I hope new users also enjoy it! Leave a comment if you do! :)
